title: scrophularia californica var. oregana
intro: Scrophularia californica var. oregana, also known as the California figwort or Oregon figwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia californica var. oregana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb for treating colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections. Scrophularia californica var. oregana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
